extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won the sprint after a late breakaway was caught, denying GROENEWEGEN with DAINESE surprising on podium
tactical_patterns: Soudal Quick-Step pivoted from Jakobsen to Ballerini as finisher, suggesting Jakobsen wasn't positioned well pre-chicane.
Eight-rider quality breakaway forced UAE/Soudal to chase without help, gap controlled to 3.5min showing calculated team power.
Chicane at 750m to go required top-10 positioning beforehand; teams outside that were eliminated regardless of sprinter quality.
De Lie water-carrying duties suggest Lotto prioritizing spring classics over stage hunting after Roglic's GC dominance.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: doubled stage wins using chicane positioning while rivals stayed too wide through technical finale
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: neutral: strong positioning through finale but couldn't match Philipsen's throw after chicane unwound
rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: DSM sprinter podiumed despite being on leadout duty for Meyerhoffer, suggesting emerging fast-twitch upgrade
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: Quick-Step switched finisher to Ballerini mid-finale indicating poor positioning or form concerns
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: swept all mountain stages and classifications showing complete stage-race dominance across disciplines
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: complained about helicopter positioning suggesting heightened race stress, but mood indicated motivation still present
